title: Testing Asynchronous Behavior Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on frontend async testing patterns.

questions.question: Regarding the testing of frontend components, what is the primary role of 'Testing Asynchronous Behavior'?
options: To verify that a React component correctly responds to asynchronous calls such as fetching data from an API

questions.question: Which React Testing Library utility is commonly used to wait for a specific condition or change in a unit test?
